description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This Standby Spell will wipe all lines, setting the
(lines) to zero. Users will still be able to exit their positions, but no new debt will be allowed to be created for any collateral.
summary: Update Emergency Spells And Protego To Agent Framework
description: Updates the Emergency Spells and Protego documents to reflect the Agent Framework, with the Core Facilitator holding decision authority and Core GovOps responsible for authenticity validation.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
